raw.subject: Your Happy Mother's Day post caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Happy Mother's Day post caught my eye - it's clear that the team at Brystol's Pet Parlor genuinely care about the people (and their pets) in Terre Haute. 

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find you or learn about your services. A website could help drive more business to your shop.

I sketched out a page idea based on your Facebook photos and posts, including a services overview, photo gallery, and contact section. The idea is simple and straightforward.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/brystol-s-pet-parlor-terre-haute

If you'd like to discuss the project further or get a quote, I'd be happy to set up a call or answer any questions you have. 
A simple project like this would come with a flat fee for local businesses, and I'd be happy to walk you through the details.
